seo-web-tools/utm-builder.metaTitle: Free UTM Builder Tool for Google Analytics | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/utm-builder.metaDescription: Generate trackable UTM links for your marketing campaigns in seconds. Free UTM builder with campaign source, medium, and name fields — no signup.
about: UTM parameters are tags you append to a URL so analytics tools like Google Analytics 4 can credit the right campaign. Common fields are utm_source (where traffic comes from), utm_medium (email, cpc, social), and utm_campaign (the promotion name). Optional term and content tags help compare ads or creatives.

Without consistent UTM naming, paid and organic channels blur together in reports. A clear naming scheme lets you measure which email, ad, or social post drove clicks and conversions — and cut spend on what does not work.

howTo.title: How to use this UTM builder
steps: Paste the destination URL you want people to land on.
Fill in campaign source, medium, and name (add term or content if you need finer splits).
Copy the generated tracking link and use it in ads, emails, or social posts.

faq.q: What are UTM parameters?
faq.a: UTM parameters are query-string tags (utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, and optional utm_term / utm_content) that tell Google Analytics which campaign sent a visitor to your site.

faq.q: Why do UTM links matter for GA4?
faq.a: GA4 uses UTMs to attribute sessions and conversions to campaigns. Consistent tags make channel and campaign reports accurate so you can optimize spend and creative.

faq.q: Is this UTM builder free?
faq.a: Yes. The UTM Builder runs in your browser on Mytulify’s Free plan — unlimited use, no signup, and your URLs never leave your device.

seo-web-tools/meta-description-length-ch.metaTitle: Meta Description Length Checker – Free SEO Tool (2026) | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/meta-description-length-ch.metaDescription: Check your meta description length instantly. See a live Google search preview and know if your description is too long, too short, or perfect for SEO. Free, no signup.
about: A meta description is the short blurb that often appears under your title in Google search results. It does not directly rank pages by itself, but a clear, compelling description improves click-through rate — which can help visibility over time. Aim for roughly 150–160 characters so the full message fits on desktop without awkward cutoffs.

If your description is too long, Google truncates it with an ellipsis and your call to action may disappear. If it is too short, you waste valuable SERP real estate and give searchers less reason to click. Use this checker to see length and a live preview before you publish.

howTo.title: How to use this tool
steps: Paste or type your meta description into the field.
Watch the character count and status (too short, ideal, or too long).
Review the Google-style preview, then tighten wording until the length is in the ideal range.

faq.q: What is the ideal meta description length?
faq.a: Most SEOs target about 150–160 characters. Exact display width varies by device and Google’s UI, so use the live preview here as a practical guide rather than a hard pixel rule.

faq.q: What happens if my meta description is too long?
faq.a: Google typically truncates long descriptions with an ellipsis. Important keywords or your call to action may get cut off, which can hurt click-through rate.

faq.q: Does Google always show my meta description?
faq.a: Not always. Google may rewrite the snippet from page content if it thinks another passage better matches the query. A strong, accurate meta description still improves your odds of a useful snippet.

seo-web-tools/meta-title-length-checker.name: Meta Title Length Checker
seo-web-tools/meta-title-length-checker.description: Check if your page title is the right length for Google — avoid truncation and improve CTR.
seo-web-tools/meta-title-length-checker.metaTitle: Meta Title Length Checker – Free SEO Tool | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/meta-title-length-checker.metaDescription: Check if your page title is the right length for Google search results. Avoid truncation and improve click-through rate. Free, instant, no signup.
about: Your meta title (the HTML title tag) is one of the strongest on-page SEO signals and the first line people see in search results. Most SEOs aim for about 50–60 characters, or roughly 600 pixels of width, so Google does not cut the title short on desktop.

Titles that run long get truncated with an ellipsis, which can hide your brand or value proposition. Titles that are too short leave unused SERP space and often underperform on clarity. Use this free checker to measure length and preview how the title may appear before you ship.

howTo.title: How to use this tool
steps: Paste your proposed page title into the title field.
Check the character count against the 50–60 character ideal range.
Adjust wording until the preview looks clear and complete, then update your title tag.

faq.q: What is the ideal meta title length?
faq.a: A practical target is 50–60 characters (about 600px). Google measures display width, not just characters, so keep important words near the front.

faq.q: Why do titles get cut off in Google?
faq.a: Search results have limited pixel width. When a title exceeds that space, Google truncates it. Shorter, front-loaded titles stay readable and clickable.

seo-web-tools/domain-name-finder.name: Domain Name Finder

seo-web-tools/ads-txt-generator.name: ads.txt Generator
seo-web-tools/ads-txt-generator.description: Create a valid ads.txt file for Google AdSense and ad networks.

seo-web-tools/url-page-seo-analyzer.name: URL Page SEO Analyzer
seo-web-tools/url-page-seo-analyzer.description: Paste a page URL to fetch live HTML and audit title, meta, headings, schema, images, and links.
seo-web-tools/url-page-seo-analyzer.metaTitle: URL Page SEO Analyzer – Free On-Page Audit by Link | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/url-page-seo-analyzer.metaDescription: Paste any page URL for a free on-page SEO audit: title, meta, headings, schema, images, and internal links. No signup.
about: Most SEO checkers make you paste HTML by hand. This analyzer fetches a public page from its URL and runs an on-page audit in one step — title and meta lengths, H1 issues, missing alt text, JSON-LD presence, content length, and internal links.
Use it for quick competitor checks, staging reviews (if publicly reachable), and client spot-checks before a deeper AI SEO Page Audit.

howTo.title: How to analyze a page by URL
steps: Paste the full page URL (https://…).
Optionally add a focus keyword to check placement in the title and intro.
Click Analyze page and review the score, issues list, heading outline, and schema preview.

faq.q: Can I analyze pages behind login?
faq.a: No. Only publicly reachable pages. For private HTML, paste source into Heading Structure Analyzer or AI SEO Page Audit instead.

faq.q: Does this crawl the whole site?
faq.a: It fetches a single URL. For site-wide work, combine with the sitemap validator, orphan page finder, and audit checklist.

seo-web-tools/url-indexing-toolkit.name: URL Indexing Toolkit
seo-web-tools/url-indexing-toolkit.description: Track URLs, fix index readiness, submit IndexNow, and verify Google/Bing site: status in one workflow.
seo-web-tools/url-indexing-toolkit.metaTitle: URL Indexing Toolkit – IndexNow, Readiness & Tracker | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/url-indexing-toolkit.metaDescription: Free URL indexing toolkit: audit noindex/robots issues, submit IndexNow to Bing/Yandex, track bulk URLs, and verify site: index status.
about: Getting links discovered is not the same as a paid “force Google index” network. This toolkit helps you do the work that actually moves indexing: remove blocks, notify participating engines via IndexNow, track batches of URLs, and verify with site: checks.
Use it after publishing pages, guest posts, or press URLs — especially when you need Bing/Yandex notification plus a clear readiness score before requesting Google crawl in Search Console.

howTo.title: How to use the indexing toolkit
steps: Paste URLs into the tracker (or open IndexNow / Readiness / Check tabs).
Run Readiness on each URL and fix noindex, robots.txt, or canonical problems.
Generate an IndexNow key, host {key}.txt on your domain, then submit same-host URLs.
Verify with Google/Bing site: links and mark indexed in the tracker.

faq.q: Does this guarantee Google indexing in minutes?
faq.a: No. IndexNow covers Bing, Yandex, and partners. Google still uses its own crawl and Search Console. We never claim a paid force-index guarantee.

faq.q: Why did IndexNow return 422?
faq.a: The key file is missing or wrong. Upload a plain-text file at your keyLocation whose contents equal your key.

seo-web-tools/indexnow-url-submitter.name: IndexNow URL Submitter
seo-web-tools/indexnow-url-submitter.description: Generate an IndexNow key and notify Bing/Yandex when URLs are published or updated.
seo-web-tools/indexnow-url-submitter.metaTitle: IndexNow URL Submitter – Notify Bing & Yandex | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/indexnow-url-submitter.metaDescription: Free IndexNow submitter: generate a key, host the key file, and submit up to 100 same-host URLs to Bing and Yandex.
about: IndexNow is an open protocol so search engines learn about new or changed URLs quickly. Host a key file on your site, then submit URL lists from that host.
Pair with the Indexing Readiness Checker so you don’t notify engines about noindex or robots-blocked pages.

howTo.title: How to submit with IndexNow
steps: Click Generate key and download/upload {key}.txt to your site root.
Paste URLs that share the same host (max 100).
Submit and confirm HTTP 200/202 — then verify discovery with Bing site: search.

faq.q: Does IndexNow ping Google?
faq.a: Not as a Google API. Google may discover changes through other signals; use Search Console URL Inspection for Google.

seo-web-tools/indexing-readiness-checker.name: Indexing Readiness Checker
seo-web-tools/indexing-readiness-checker.description: Audit a live URL for noindex, robots.txt blocks, canonical mismatches, and crawl barriers.
seo-web-tools/indexing-readiness-checker.metaTitle: Indexing Readiness Checker – Fix noindex & robots Blocks | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/indexing-readiness-checker.metaDescription: Free indexing readiness audit: live HTTP status, meta robots, X-Robots-Tag, robots.txt path blocks, and canonical checks.
about: If a URL can’t be indexed, submitting it anywhere wastes time. This checker fetches the live page and robots.txt to surface noindex, disallow rules, and canonical conflicts.
Fix errors here first, then use IndexNow and Google Search Console.

howTo.title: How to audit index readiness
steps: Paste a public page URL.
Review the score and issue list (errors block indexing).
Fix noindex/robots/canonical, re-audit, then submit IndexNow or request indexing in GSC.

faq.q: Does a high score mean Google will index it?
faq.a: It means the URL looks crawlable/indexable. Indexing still depends on quality, links, and Google’s crawl budget.

seo-web-tools/url-index-status-checker.name: URL Index Status Checker
seo-web-tools/url-index-status-checker.description: Soft-check index presence and open Google/Bing site: verification links for any URL.
seo-web-tools/url-index-status-checker.metaTitle: URL Index Status Checker – Google & Bing site: Links | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/url-index-status-checker.metaDescription: Check if a URL looks indexed with a soft Bing signal plus one-click Google and Bing site: verification links.
about: Automatic “is it indexed?” checks are best-effort without Search Console API access. This tool runs a soft Bing HTML check and always gives you Google/Bing site: links to confirm.
Mark confirmed URLs in the URL Indexing Toolkit tracker for campaign reporting.

howTo.title: How to check index status
steps: Paste the URL and run Soft index check.
Open Google and Bing site: links to confirm.
Optionally mark indexed in the toolkit tracker.

faq.q: Why is confidence low?
faq.a: Search result pages change and may block bots. Treat automatic results as hints; site: links are the source of truth for free checks.

seo-web-tools/related-keywords-generator.name: Related Keywords Generator
seo-web-tools/related-keywords-generator.description: Expand seed keywords into questions, commercial modifiers, long-tail phrases, and combinations for research.
seo-web-tools/related-keywords-generator.metaTitle: Related Keywords Generator – Free Keyword Research Tool | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/related-keywords-generator.metaDescription: Generate related keywords, questions, commercial modifiers, and long-tail phrases from seed terms. Free keyword research expander — no signup.
about: Keyword research starts with a seed, then expands into the questions and modifiers people actually type. Related keywords help you cover a topic cluster, build internal links, and find easier long-tail wins before chasing competitive head terms.

This tool builds a keyword universe in your browser: question prefixes, commercial intent modifiers, informational suffixes, long-tail variants, and combinations with your secondary modifiers. Export the list into a rank tracker, content calendar, or AI content brief.

howTo.title: How to generate related keywords
steps: Enter one or more seed keywords (one per line).
Optionally add secondary modifiers such as industries, audiences, or products.
Review grouped suggestions, then copy or download the full list for research.

faq.q: Does this pull live search volume?
faq.a: No. It expands keywords with proven SEO modifiers in your browser. Pair the list with Google Keyword Planner, Ahrefs, or Search Console for volume and difficulty.

faq.q: How should I use the output?
faq.a: Cluster by intent, map each cluster to a page type, then brief writers or feed seeds into the Content Brief Generator and Keyword Rank Tracker.

seo-web-tools/keyword-difficulty-estimat.name: Keyword Difficulty Estimator
seo-web-tools/keyword-difficulty-estimat.description: Estimate keyword competitiveness from SERP signals like brands, content length, and authority.
seo-web-tools/keyword-difficulty-estimat.metaTitle: Keyword Difficulty Estimator – Free SEO Score | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/keyword-difficulty-estimat.metaDescription: Estimate keyword difficulty from SERP signals — brands, .gov/.edu, content length, and authority. Free heuristic KD score, no API key.
about: Keyword difficulty tools usually score how hard it is to rank on page one. Live KD APIs need paid data; this estimator uses SERP observations you can gather yourself — brand dominance, publisher strength, and typical content depth.
Use it to prioritize opportunistic long-tail terms versus head terms that need months of authority building. Always validate with real SERPs before committing to a content investment.

howTo.title: How to estimate keyword difficulty
steps: Enter the keyword and approximate average word count of the top results.
Set a typical referring-domain strength and note if brands or .gov/.edu dominate.
Add SERP domain notes, then read the 0–100 score, band, and recommended next step.

faq.q: Is this the same as Ahrefs or Moz KD?
faq.a: No. It is a transparent heuristic based on inputs you provide. Use it for prioritization, not as a substitute for paid link metrics.

faq.q: What score should I target?
faq.a: Newer or thinner sites usually win more often below ~45. Hard scores still work with strong differentiation, links, and topical authority.

seo-web-tools/search-intent-classifier.name: Search Intent Classifier
seo-web-tools/search-intent-classifier.description: Classify keywords as informational, commercial, transactional, or navigational with page-type suggestions.
seo-web-tools/search-intent-classifier.metaTitle: Search Intent Classifier – Free SEO Keyword Tool | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/search-intent-classifier.metaDescription: Classify keywords by search intent (informational, commercial, transactional, navigational) and get suggested page types. Free CSV export.
about: Matching search intent is one of the highest-leverage SEO skills. A transactional query wants a product or pricing page; an informational query wants a guide. Publishing the wrong page type wastes rankings and conversions.
Paste a keyword list to classify intent from linguistic signals and export CSV for briefs, calendars, or agency deliverables.

howTo.title: How to classify search intent
steps: Paste keywords one per line.
Review the intent and suggested page type for each row.
Download the CSV and align each keyword with the right content format.

faq.q: What are the four main search intents?
faq.a: Informational (learn), navigational (find a site), commercial investigation (compare before buying), and transactional (buy or convert).

seo-web-tools/xml-sitemap-validator.name: XML Sitemap Validator
seo-web-tools/xml-sitemap-validator.description: Validate sitemap XML for parse errors, bad URLs, duplicates, lastmod dates, and the 50k limit.
seo-web-tools/xml-sitemap-validator.metaTitle: XML Sitemap Validator – Free Technical SEO Tool | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/xml-sitemap-validator.metaDescription: Validate XML sitemaps for parse errors, duplicate URLs, lastmod issues, and the 50,000 URL limit. Free client-side sitemap checker.
about: An XML sitemap helps search engines discover important URLs. Invalid XML, duplicate locs, or oversized files can leave pages undiscovered or ignore lastmod signals.
Paste sitemap XML to catch structural issues before you submit the file in Google Search Console or Bing Webmaster Tools.

howTo.title: How to validate a sitemap
steps: Paste your sitemap.xml contents (or a sitemap index entry list).
Review errors and warnings for parse issues, duplicates, and URL limits.
Fix the file, re-upload, and resubmit in Search Console if needed.

faq.q: What is the URL limit for a sitemap?
faq.a: A single sitemap file should stay under 50,000 URLs and 50 MB uncompressed. Split large sites into multiple sitemaps referenced by a sitemap index.

seo-web-tools/heading-structure-analyzer.name: Heading Structure Analyzer
seo-web-tools/heading-structure-analyzer.description: Audit H1–H6 outlines in page HTML for multiple H1s, skipped levels, and empty headings.
seo-web-tools/heading-structure-analyzer.metaTitle: Heading Structure Analyzer – Free On-Page SEO Tool | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/heading-structure-analyzer.metaDescription: Audit H1–H6 heading outlines for multiple H1s, skipped levels, and empty headings. Free HTML heading analyzer for on-page SEO.
about: Clear heading hierarchy helps users and crawlers understand page structure. Multiple H1s, skipped levels, and empty headings are common on-page issues that hurt scannability and sometimes snippet eligibility.
Paste HTML to extract the outline and flag problems before you publish or hand work to a developer.

howTo.title: How to analyze headings
steps: Paste page HTML (view-source or CMS export).
Review the H1–H6 outline and issue list.
Fix hierarchy so one clear H1 leads nested H2/H3 sections.

faq.q: Should every page have only one H1?
faq.a: Best practice is a single descriptive H1 that matches the primary topic. Extra H1s are not always a hard penalty, but they confuse structure and SEO reviews.

seo-web-tools/seo-audit-checklist.name: SEO Audit Checklist
seo-web-tools/seo-audit-checklist.description: Interactive technical, on-page, E-E-A-T, and link audit checklist with progress saved in your browser.
seo-web-tools/seo-audit-checklist.metaTitle: SEO Audit Checklist – Free Technical & On-Page SEO | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/seo-audit-checklist.metaDescription: Run a free interactive SEO audit checklist covering technical SEO, on-page, E-E-A-T, and links. Progress saves in your browser.
about: A structured SEO audit prevents skipped fundamentals — indexing, Core Web Vitals-related hygiene, meta tags, internal links, and trust signals. Checklists turn vague “we should audit the site” into measurable progress.
This interactive checklist covers technical, on-page, E-E-A-T, and link items with local progress saving so you can resume client or site audits without a spreadsheet.

howTo.title: How to run the SEO audit checklist
steps: Open the checklist and work section by section (technical, on-page, E-E-A-T, links).
Mark items done as you verify them in Search Console, analytics, and the live site.
Export or note remaining gaps, then prioritize fixes by impact.

faq.q: Is checklist progress synced to the cloud?
faq.a: No. Progress is stored in your browser locally so audits stay private and free.

seo-web-tools/seo-content-score.name: SEO Content Score
seo-web-tools/seo-content-score.description: Score on-page SEO for a draft — keyword placement, density, title/meta length, and scannability.
seo-web-tools/seo-content-score.metaTitle: SEO Content Score – Free On-Page SEO Checker | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/seo-content-score.metaDescription: Score draft content for on-page SEO: keyword placement, density, title/meta length, and scannability. Free content SEO checker.
about: On-page SEO scoring helps writers ship drafts that already cover basics: focus keyword in the title and intro, sensible density, readable structure, and meta lengths that fit SERPs.
Paste a draft and target keyword to get a transparent score with actionable gaps — then refine before publishing or running an AI page audit.

howTo.title: How to score content for SEO
steps: Enter the focus keyword and optional title/meta fields.
Paste the full draft body.
Review the score breakdown and fix the lowest-scoring checks.

faq.q: What is a good SEO content score?
faq.a: Aim for a high band after covering keyword placement, structure, and meta length — without stuffing. Use the checklist items, not vanity scores alone.

seo-web-tools/keyword-rank-tracker.name: Keyword Rank Tracker
seo-web-tools/keyword-rank-tracker.description: Log keyword rankings over time in your browser and export CSV reports — no API key required.
seo-web-tools/keyword-rank-tracker.metaTitle: Keyword Rank Tracker – Free Browser SEO Tracker | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/keyword-rank-tracker.metaDescription: Track keyword rankings over time in your browser. Log positions, notes, and export CSV — free rank tracker with no API key.
about: Rank tracking shows whether SEO work moves positions for target queries. Enterprise trackers poll SERPs automatically; this tool lets you manually log positions you observe and keep a private history.
Ideal for freelancers and small sites that want a lightweight CSV-friendly log without another SaaS subscription.

howTo.title: How to track keyword ranks
steps: Add keywords and the URL or site you are monitoring.
Enter the position you see (incognito SERP or Search Console).
Save entries over time and export CSV for clients or reports.

faq.q: Does this scrape Google automatically?
faq.a: No. You enter positions manually (or from Search Console). That keeps the tool free, private, and ToS-safe.

seo-web-tools/backlink-profile-analyzer.name: Backlink Profile Analyzer
seo-web-tools/backlink-profile-analyzer.description: Analyze Ahrefs/Semrush/Moz backlink CSV exports for anchors, referring hosts, and follow mix.
seo-web-tools/backlink-profile-analyzer.metaTitle: Backlink Profile Analyzer – Free CSV SEO Tool | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/backlink-profile-analyzer.metaDescription: Analyze Ahrefs, Semrush, or Moz backlink CSV exports — referring hosts, anchors, follow/nofollow mix, and average authority. Free, private.
about: Backlink analysis reveals who links to you, which anchors dominate, and whether follow vs nofollow mix looks natural. Paid tools export CSV; this analyzer summarizes that export in your browser.
Use it to spot over-optimized anchors, thin referring-host diversity, or candidates for a disavow review — without uploading data to another cloud.

howTo.title: How to analyze a backlink CSV
steps: Export backlinks from Ahrefs, Semrush, or Moz as CSV.
Paste the CSV into the analyzer.
Review host counts, follow mix, top anchors, and the tip — then act on outreach or cleanup.

faq.q: Which CSV columns are required?
faq.a: At least a referring URL or anchor column. Domain rating / authority and follow type columns are used when present.

seo-web-tools/disavow-file-generator.name: Disavow File Generator
seo-web-tools/disavow-file-generator.description: Build a Google Search Console disavow.txt from spam domains and URLs.
seo-web-tools/disavow-file-generator.metaTitle: Disavow File Generator – Free Google Disavow Tool | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/disavow-file-generator.metaDescription: Build a Google Search Console disavow.txt from spam domains and URLs. Free disavow file generator with domain and URL blocks.
about: Google’s disavow tool tells Search Console to ignore specific toxic links when assessing your site. Use it carefully — only for clear spam or paid-link risk after other cleanup fails.
Paste domains and URLs to generate a correctly formatted disavow.txt ready to upload.

howTo.title: How to create a disavow file
steps: List spam domains (one per line) and optional full URLs.
Copy the generated disavow.txt contents.
Upload in Google Search Console → Disavow links (advanced) after reviewing carefully.

faq.q: Should I disavow most backlinks?
faq.a: No. Disavow is for clear spam or manipulative links. Over-disavowing can remove useful equity. Prefer outreach and natural link growth first.

seo-web-tools/internal-link-suggester.name: Internal Link Suggester
seo-web-tools/internal-link-suggester.description: Suggest internal links from your page list into a draft using keyword overlap scoring.
seo-web-tools/internal-link-suggester.metaTitle: Internal Link Suggester – Free SEO Linking Tool | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/internal-link-suggester.metaDescription: Suggest internal links from your URL/title list into a draft using keyword overlap. Free internal linking helper for SEO.
about: Internal links distribute equity, clarify topical relationships, and help crawlers discover pages. Manual linking at scale is slow; overlap scoring between draft text and your page inventory surfaces relevant targets quickly.
Paste a sitemap-style page list and your draft to get suggested anchors and destination URLs.

howTo.title: How to suggest internal links
steps: Paste your pages (URL and title or keywords).
Paste the draft content you are optimizing.
Add the highest-relevance suggestions as contextual links with natural anchors.

faq.q: How many internal links should a page have?
faq.a: Enough to help readers and crawlers — typically a handful of highly relevant contextual links beat dozens of weak ones.

seo-web-tools/orphan-page-finder.name: Orphan Page Finder
seo-web-tools/orphan-page-finder.description: Find sitemap URLs with no internal links and linked URLs missing from the sitemap.
seo-web-tools/orphan-page-finder.metaTitle: Orphan Page Finder – Free Technical SEO Tool | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/orphan-page-finder.metaDescription: Find orphan pages: sitemap URLs with no internal links, and linked URLs missing from the sitemap. Free crawl-gap checker.
about: Orphan pages exist in a sitemap or CMS but lack internal links, so users and crawlers rarely reach them. Conversely, linked URLs missing from the sitemap may be important discoveries you forgot to include.
Compare your sitemap URL list against extracted internal links to close crawl and linking gaps.

howTo.title: How to find orphan pages
steps: Paste sitemap URLs (one per line).
Paste HTML or a list of internal links found on the site.
Review orphans and sitemap gaps, then add links or update the sitemap.

faq.q: Why do orphan pages hurt SEO?
faq.a: Without internal links, pages get fewer crawls and less topical context. Important content should sit in a clear internal linking graph.

seo-web-tools/schema-markup-validator.name: Schema Markup Validator
seo-web-tools/schema-markup-validator.description: Validate JSON-LD structure for FAQ, HowTo, Product, LocalBusiness, and common schema errors.
seo-web-tools/schema-markup-validator.metaTitle: Schema Markup Validator – Free JSON-LD Checker | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/schema-markup-validator.metaDescription: Validate JSON-LD structured data for FAQ, HowTo, Product, LocalBusiness, and common schema errors. Free client-side schema checker.
about: Structured data helps search engines understand entities, FAQs, products, and local businesses — and can enable rich results. Invalid JSON-LD silently fails rich-result eligibility.
Paste JSON-LD to catch missing @type, broken @context, and type-specific required fields before deploying.

howTo.title: How to validate schema markup
steps: Paste your JSON-LD script contents.
Review errors and warnings by schema type.
Fix issues, then confirm in Google’s Rich Results Test when ready.

faq.q: Does this replace Google’s Rich Results Test?
faq.a: It catches structural and common field issues locally. Always re-check critical pages in Google’s official tools before launch.

seo-web-tools/howto-schema-generator.name: HowTo Schema Generator
seo-web-tools/howto-schema-generator.description: Generate HowTo JSON-LD structured data from a title and step-by-step list.
seo-web-tools/howto-schema-generator.metaTitle: HowTo Schema Generator – Free JSON-LD Tool | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/howto-schema-generator.metaDescription: Generate HowTo JSON-LD from a title and steps. Free HowTo schema markup generator for rich results eligibility.
about: HowTo structured data describes step-by-step instructions. When eligible, it can power richer presentations of instructional content in search.
Enter a title and steps to generate copy-paste JSON-LD for your guide pages.

howTo.title: How to generate HowTo schema
steps: Enter the how-to title and optional description.
Add steps in order (one per line or fields).
Copy the JSON-LD into a script tag on the page and validate.

faq.q: Is HowTo rich result still available?
faq.a: Eligibility and display change over time by Google. Valid markup still helps machines understand steps even when rich UI varies.

seo-web-tools/local-business-schema-gene.name: Local Business Schema Generator
seo-web-tools/local-business-schema-gene.description: Create LocalBusiness JSON-LD with NAP, geo coordinates, and business type.
seo-web-tools/local-business-schema-gene.metaTitle: Local Business Schema Generator – Free Local SEO | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/local-business-schema-gene.metaDescription: Generate LocalBusiness JSON-LD with name, address, phone, geo, and type. Free local SEO schema markup tool.
about: LocalBusiness schema clarifies NAP (name, address, phone), geo coordinates, and business type for local search and knowledge panels.
Fill in business details once to generate consistent JSON-LD that matches your Google Business Profile and citations.

howTo.title: How to generate LocalBusiness schema
steps: Enter business name, type, address, phone, and optional geo coordinates.
Copy the generated JSON-LD.
Place it on your homepage or contact page and keep NAP identical across citations.

faq.q: What is NAP consistency?
faq.a: Name, Address, and Phone should match everywhere — website, Google Business Profile, and directories. Inconsistencies confuse local ranking signals.

seo-web-tools/nap-consistency-checker.name: NAP Consistency Checker
seo-web-tools/nap-consistency-checker.description: Compare Name, Address, Phone across local citations to catch local SEO inconsistencies.
seo-web-tools/nap-consistency-checker.metaTitle: NAP Consistency Checker – Free Local SEO Tool | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/nap-consistency-checker.metaDescription: Compare Name, Address, Phone across local citations to find inconsistencies. Free NAP checker for local SEO audits.
about: Local SEO relies on consistent business identity. Different phone formats, suite numbers, or trading names across directories weaken trust and can suppress local pack visibility.
Paste citation variants to spot mismatches before you claim or update listings.

howTo.title: How to check NAP consistency
steps: Enter the canonical NAP you want everywhere.
Paste other citation versions (directories, GBP, site footer).
Fix every mismatch so spelling, punctuation, and phone format align.

faq.q: Do phone formatting differences matter?
faq.a: Digits should match. Prefer one canonical format on the site and mirror it on major citations when possible.

seo-web-tools/content-brief-generator.name: Content Brief Generator
seo-web-tools/content-brief-generator.description: AI SEO content brief with outline, PAA questions, keywords, and on-page checklist.
seo-web-tools/content-brief-generator.metaTitle: AI Content Brief Generator for SEO | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/content-brief-generator.metaDescription: Generate an AI SEO content brief with title ideas, outline, PAA-style questions, keywords, and on-page checklist. Free AI SEO workflow.
about: A strong content brief aligns writers with search intent, target keywords, outline depth, and on-page requirements before drafting. Briefs reduce revisions and thin content.
This AI workflow produces title ideas, secondary keywords, H2/H3 outline, People Also Ask style questions, internal link ideas, word-count targets, and an on-page checklist.

howTo.title: How to generate an SEO content brief
steps: Enter the primary keyword or topic and audience.
Choose search intent (informational, commercial, or transactional).
Generate the brief and hand it to writers or feed the outline into the AI SEO Outline Generator.

faq.q: Is the brief ready to publish as an article?
faq.a: No — it is a strategy document. Use it to draft original content, then score the draft with SEO Content Score.

seo-web-tools/ai-meta-tag-writer.name: AI Meta Tag Writer
seo-web-tools/ai-meta-tag-writer.description: AI-written title tags and meta descriptions optimized for CTR and character limits.
seo-web-tools/ai-meta-tag-writer.metaTitle: AI Meta Tag Writer – Titles & Descriptions | Mytulify
seo-web-tools/ai-meta-tag-writer.metaDescription: Generate AI title tags and meta descriptions optimized for CTR and SERP length. Free AI meta tag writer for SEO.
about: Title tags and meta descriptions are your SERP ad copy. Clear keyword placement plus a benefit-driven CTA improves click-through without keyword stuffing.

faq.q: What is aspect ratio?
faq.a: Aspect ratio compares width to height. A 1920×1080 video simplifies to 16:9 — the same shape at any resolution.

faq.q: Which ratio should I use for Instagram Reels?
faq.a: Reels and TikTok Shorts typically use 9:16 (vertical). Feed posts often use 1:1 or 4:5.

calculators/profit-margin-calculator.name: Profit Margin Calculator
calculators/profit-margin-calculator.description: Calculate profit, profit margin %, and markup from cost and selling price.
calculators/profit-margin-calculator.metaTitle: Profit Margin Calculator – Free Online Tool | Mytulify
calculators/profit-margin-calculator.metaDescription: Calculate profit, profit margin percentage, and markup from cost and price. Also find the selling price for a target margin. Free — no signup.
about: Profit margin shows what share of the selling price is profit (profit ÷ price). Markup shows profit relative to cost (profit ÷ cost). Confusing the two leads to underpricing — a 50% markup is only a 33% margin.
Enter cost and selling price to see profit, margin, and markup instantly. Or set a target margin to find the price you need to charge.

howTo.title: How to calculate profit margin
steps: Enter your product or service cost.
Enter the selling price (or a target margin % to reverse-calculate price).
Review profit, margin %, markup %, and required price.

faq.q: What is the difference between margin and markup?
faq.a: Margin = profit ÷ selling price. Markup = profit ÷ cost. A $50 cost sold at $100 is 50% margin and 100% markup.

faq.q: How do I price for a 40% margin?
faq.a: Price = cost ÷ (1 − 0.40). Use the target margin field in this calculator to get that price automatically.

faq.q: Is my data private?
faq.a: Yes. All math runs in your browser — nothing is uploaded.

calculators/debt-payoff-calculator.name: Debt Payoff Calculator

about: Avalanche attacks the highest APR first (usually less interest). Snowball clears the smallest balance first (faster psychological wins). The best plan is the one you’ll stick with — this calculator shows the math for both.
Add each debt’s balance, APR, and minimum payment, plus any extra monthly amount, to estimate payoff time and interest.

howTo.title: How to plan debt payoff
steps: List each debt with balance, APR, and minimum payment.
Enter extra money you can put toward debt each month.
Switch between avalanche and snowball to compare interest and months.

faq.q: Which method is better?
faq.a: Avalanche usually costs less interest. Snowball can feel more motivating. Use the comparison notice to see the trade-off for your numbers.

calculators/inflation-calculator.name: Inflation Calculator

about: Inflation silently reduces what a currency unit can buy. A purchasing-power calculator shows how much more (or less) money you need after several years at a given average rate.

howTo.title: How to use the inflation calculator

Enter amount, average annual inflation %, and years.
Read the equivalent amount and purchasing-power change.

faq.q: What inflation rate should I use?
faq.a: Use a long-run average for your country (often roughly 2–4% in many economies). Official CPI series are more precise for historical years.

Copy the rounded “X min read” result for your byline.

faq.q: What WPM should I use?
faq.a: 200 WPM is a common default for silent adult reading. Skim-heavy content may read faster; technical material may be slower.

faq.q: Does this count images or videos?
faq.a: No — it estimates from text words only. Add extra time yourself if the page has heavy media.

freelancer-tools/contract-generator.name: Freelance Contract Generator
freelancer-tools/contract-generator.description: Free freelance contract template & independent contractor agreement generator — scope, payment terms, IP, confidentiality, PDF download.
freelancer-tools/contract-generator.metaTitle: Free Freelance Contract Template Generator – PDF Download | Mytulify
freelancer-tools/contract-generator.metaDescription: Create a freelance contract template or independent contractor agreement with scope, milestones, IP, NDA & late fees. Free PDF — no signup, runs in browser.
about: A freelance contract template protects you from scope creep, late payments, and IP disputes. This free contract generator creates a professional independent contractor agreement covering deliverables, payment schedule, revision limits, confidentiality, termination, and intellectual property — then exports a branded PDF in seconds.

Whether you are a web developer, designer, writer, or consultant, a written freelance agreement sets clear expectations before work begins. Clients take you more seriously, and you have a paper trail if payment or scope issues arise.

Unlike generic Word templates, this tool runs 100% in your browser on Mytulify — your client names, rates, and scope never leave your device. Choose from industry templates (web, design, writing, consulting, retainer, software) or build a custom contract from scratch.
This is a practical template, not legal advice. Have a qualified attorney review your freelance services agreement for your jurisdiction before signing important deals.

howTo.title: How to create a freelance contract
steps: Pick a contract template (web design, graphic design, writing, consulting, retainer, or software development) or start blank.
Enter freelancer and client details — names, emails, addresses, and a contract reference number.
Define scope of work with clear inclusions and exclusions to prevent scope creep.
Set payment terms: total value, currency, deposit %, milestone schedule, Net 15/30, late fees, and kill fee.
Toggle legal clauses: confidentiality, IP ownership, portfolio rights, liability cap, force majeure, and dispute resolution.
Preview the full agreement, copy the text, or download a branded PDF to send for e-signature.

faq.q: What should a freelance contract include?
faq.a: At minimum: parties, scope of work, payment amount and schedule, deadline, revision limits, IP ownership, confidentiality, termination terms, and late payment fees. Our generator includes all of these plus optional clauses for portfolio rights, expenses, and dispute resolution.

faq.q: Is this freelance contract template legally binding?
faq.a: It is a starting template, not legal advice. Binding effect depends on your jurisdiction, how both parties sign, and whether terms are enforceable locally. Consult a lawyer for high-value or complex engagements.

faq.q: Can I use this as an independent contractor agreement?
faq.a: Yes. The consulting and retainer templates are designed for independent contractor relationships. Adjust scope, payment, and IP clauses to match your engagement type.

faq.q: Does my contract data leave the browser?
faq.a: No. Everything runs client-side on Mytulify — we do not upload, store, or see your contract text, client names, or payment terms.

faq.q: Can I download the contract as PDF?
faq.a: Yes. Click Download PDF for a professionally formatted contract with signature lines. You can also copy plain text or download a .txt file for editing in Word or Google Docs.

faq.q: What is the difference between a freelance contract and a proposal?
faq.a: A proposal sells the project (scope, timeline, pricing pitch). A contract legally defines the engagement after the client says yes. Use our Proposal Generator first, then this Contract Generator once they agree.

faq.a: Choose Web Design, Content Writing, or Consulting — or keep blank and paste your own structure.

freelancer-tools/nda-generator.name: NDA Generator

freelancer-tools/nda-generator.metaDescription: Create a mutual or one-way NDA with purpose, term, and jurisdiction. Free PDF download — runs privately in your browser.

This tool drafts a simple PDF template. Complex deals still need an attorney.

howTo.title: How to generate an NDA

Set term length, mutual vs one-way, and jurisdiction.
Download the PDF for review and signature.

faq.q: Mutual vs one-way?
faq.a: Mutual protects both parties. One-way protects only the disclosing party’s information.

faq.q: Is this legal advice?
faq.a: No. Templates help you draft faster; counsel should review critical agreements.

freelancer-tools/rate-calculator.name: Freelance Rate Calculator

freelancer-tools/rate-calculator.metaTitle: Freelance Rate Calculator – Free Hourly Rate Tool | Mytulify
freelancer-tools/rate-calculator.metaDescription: Calculate your freelance hourly rate from income goals, expenses, time off, billable hours, and margin. Transparent math — free, no signup.
about: Undercharging often comes from assuming 40 billable hours a week. Real freelancers spend time on sales, admin, and learning. This calculator uses realistic billable hours and shows the math.
Set income, expenses, days off, hours, and a buffer margin to get a recommended rate.

howTo.title: How to set your rate
steps: Enter desired annual income and yearly expenses.
Set vacation days and realistic billable hours per week.
Add a profit/buffer % and read the recommended hourly rate.

faq.q: Why not 40 hours?
faq.a: Non-billable work is real. Many freelancers bill 20–30 hours/week on average.

faq.q: Should I quote hourly or fixed?
faq.a: Use this rate to price fixed quotes too — estimate hours, then add margin with the Quote Calculator.

freelancer-tools/quote-calculator.metaDescription: Calculate a project quote from hours, hourly rate, expenses, and profit margin. Free breakdown for freelancers — no signup.

howTo.title: How to build a quote
steps: Enter estimated hours and hourly rate.
Add fixed project expenses.
Set desired margin % and use the total in your proposal.

faq.q: What margin should I use?
faq.a: Many freelancers add 10–25% for risk and revisions. Adjust for project complexity.

faq.q: Where do I send invoices?
faq.a: Use Mytulify’s Invoice Generator once the quote is accepted.

freelancer-tools/late-fee-calculator.name: Late Payment Fee Calculator
freelancer-tools/late-fee-calculator.description: Calculate late fees on overdue invoices with flat or monthly percentage rates.
freelancer-tools/late-fee-calculator.metaTitle: Late Payment Fee Calculator – Free Invoice Tool | Mytulify
freelancer-tools/late-fee-calculator.metaDescription: Calculate overdue invoice late fees with a flat fee or % per month. See days overdue and new total due — free browser tool.
about: Late fees only work if your contract allows them and local law permits. This calculator helps you quantify what is owed so you can follow up professionally.
Pick flat or monthly percentage, enter due date and amount, and see the updated balance.

howTo.title: How to calculate a late fee
steps: Enter invoice amount and due date.
Choose flat fee or % per month.
Read days overdue, fee, and new total.

faq.q: Is a late fee always enforceable?
faq.a: It depends on your contract and local rules. Check before charging.

faq.q: How do I put this in a contract?
faq.a: Use the Freelance Contract Generator and set a late payment fee percentage.

freelancer-tools/break-even-calculator.name: Break-Even Calculator
freelancer-tools/break-even-calculator.description: Find how many projects or hours you need each month to cover fixed costs.
freelancer-tools/break-even-calculator.metaTitle: Freelance Break-Even Calculator – Free Tool | Mytulify
freelancer-tools/break-even-calculator.metaDescription: Calculate how many projects or hours you need each month to break even. Free tool for freelancers and small businesses.
about: Break-even tells you the minimum volume required before you profit. Fixed costs (rent, software, insurance) must be covered by contribution margin on each project or hour.
Enter monthly fixed costs, price, and variable cost to see units needed.

howTo.title: How to find break-even
steps: Enter fixed monthly costs.
Enter average price and variable cost per project or hour.
Read how many units you need this month.

faq.q: What is contribution margin?
faq.a: Price minus variable cost — what is left to cover fixed costs and profit.

faq.q: How does this relate to rates?
faq.a: If break-even volume feels impossible, raise rates with the Rate Calculator or cut fixed costs.

freelancer-tools/self-employment-tax-cal.name: Self-Employment Tax Calculator
freelancer-tools/self-employment-tax-cal.description: Estimate US self-employment tax or Pakistan income tax on freelance net income — for planning only.
freelancer-tools/self-employment-tax-cal.metaDescription: Estimate US self-employment tax plus rough income tax, or a simplified Pakistan tax estimate on freelance income. Planning only — not tax advice.
about: Freelancers often forget self-employment or income tax until filing season. This calculator gives a planning estimate for US SE tax (~15.3% on most net earnings) plus a rough federal income tax sketch, and a simplified Pakistan income-tax estimate.
Always treat results as educational. Tax law changes and your situation may differ — talk to a tax professional.

howTo.title: How to estimate tax
steps: Choose United States or Pakistan.
Enter net or taxable freelance income.
Review the breakdown and save notes for planning.

faq.q: Is this official tax advice?
faq.a: No. Estimates only. Use a CPA or tax advisor for filing.

faq.q: Why 15.3% for the US?
faq.a: That approximates Social Security and Medicare self-employment tax on net earnings (with the common 92.35% base adjustment).

freelancer-tools/client-onboarding-form.name: Client Onboarding Form Generator
freelancer-tools/client-onboarding-form.description: Generate a client intake questionnaire as a printable PDF or downloadable HTML form.
freelancer-tools/client-onboarding-form.metaTitle: Client Onboarding Form Generator – Free PDF/HTML | Mytulify
freelancer-tools/client-onboarding-form.metaDescription: Create a client intake questionnaire with goals, budget, timeline, and brand assets. Download PDF or HTML — free, private, no signup.
about: A structured onboarding form prevents missing requirements and awkward mid-project surprises. Ask about goals, budget, timeline, assets, and stakeholders before kickoff.

howTo.title: How to onboard a client
steps: Enter your business name and toggle optional questions.
Preview the questionnaire.
Download PDF or HTML and send it to the client.

faq.q: Can clients fill it online on Mytulify?

faq.q: What next after onboarding?
faq.a: Send a contract and proposal, then invoice with our Invoice Generator.

freelancer-tools/change-order-generator.name: Scope Change Order Generator
freelancer-tools/change-order-generator.description: Document out-of-scope work with added cost and time — protect yourself with a PDF change order.
freelancer-tools/change-order-generator.metaTitle: Scope Change Order Generator – Free PDF | Mytulify
freelancer-tools/change-order-generator.metaDescription: Create a freelance change order for extra work, cost, and timeline. Free PDF download — stop unpaid “one more thing” requests.
about: Scope creep kills margins. When a client asks for work outside the original agreement, a signed change order documents cost and time before you start.
Fill project reference, new work, cost, and days added — then download a PDF with signature lines.

howTo.title: How to issue a change order
steps: Reference the original contract or proposal.
Describe the extra work, cost, and timeline impact.
Download the PDF and get client approval before starting.

faq.q: What if the client refuses to sign?
faq.a: Do not start the extra work. Point back to the original scope and offer a new quote.

faq.q: Should this match my contract?

freelancer-tools/email-templates-generat.name: Freelance Email Templates Generator
freelancer-tools/email-templates-generat.description: Generate personalized freelance emails for cold pitches, follow-ups, invoice reminders, retainers, testimonials, and scope changes.
freelancer-tools/email-templates-generat.metaTitle: Free Freelance Email Templates Generator – Pitch, Invoice & Follow-Up | Mytulify
freelancer-tools/email-templates-generat.metaDescription: Create personalized freelance email templates for cold pitches, client follow-ups, invoice reminders, retainers, and scope changes. Copy or open in Gmail/Outlook — free.
about: Chasing invoices and nudging silent clients is awkward — but vague emails get ignored. Templated messages that still sound personal save freelancers time and reduce the friction around money conversations: amount owed, original due date, and a clear next step in plain language.

This free generator covers cold pitches, proposal follow-ups, three levels of invoice reminders, retainer check-ins, thank-you and testimonial asks, and scope-change notices. Pick a tone (friendly, professional, or firm) so the phrasing actually changes, fill in client and project details, then copy the email or open it in Gmail or Outlook with the subject and body already filled.

howTo.title: How to generate a freelance email
steps: Choose a template (pitch, follow-up, invoice reminder, retainer, thank-you, or scope change).
Select a tone and fill client name, project, and invoice fields when shown.
Edit the subject if needed, then copy the email or open it in Gmail, Outlook, or your mail app.

faq.q: How do I politely ask a client for overdue payment?
faq.a: Start with the friendly invoice reminder: restate the amount and original due date, assume good intent, and offer to resend payment details. If there’s no reply, move to the firm reminder, then the final notice — always matching what your contract allows for late fees.

faq.q: What should a freelance follow-up email include?
faq.a: Reference the proposal or project by name, remind them you’re available, invite a simple yes/no or scheduling reply, and avoid guilt-tripping. One short follow-up 5–7 days after sending a proposal is usually enough before a final check-in.

faq.q: Is it okay to automate freelance emails?
faq.a: Using templates is fine — and smart — as long as you personalize names, project details, and dates. Don’t blast identical cold pitches to dozens of clients. For invoices, pair templates with a clear invoice from the Invoice Generator and documented late-fee terms.

strings.faqSafeA: Yes. The {name} runs entirely in your browser, so your files and text are not uploaded to Mytulify servers for processing. That client-side design keeps routine work private on your device. Still avoid sharing secrets in any online tool if policies forbid it.
strings.faqDataQ: How is my data handled by the {name}?
strings.faqDataA: The {name} sends your input to Mytulify’s server, which calls an AI model to generate the result. We do not keep a long-term archive of your prompts. Avoid pasting passwords, private keys, or confidential data, and always review AI output before you rely on it.
strings.faqHowAClient: Open the {name}, enter or upload your input, then run the tool. {desc} The result appears instantly on your device so you can copy or download it without waiting on a server queue.
strings.faqHowAAi: Open the {name}, paste or upload your content, then click generate. {desc} An AI model returns a result in a few seconds — review it, then copy or download what you need.
